content.rendered:
Transaction Advisory Services

Our Services Provided
  • Technical and financial feasibility report
  • Project structuring within the legal and regulatory framework
  • Financial structuring and packaging
  • Risk assessment and mitigation strategies
  • Development of final contractual framework
  • Preparation of Expression of Interest (EoI)/Request For Qualification (RFQ)
  • Preparation of Request For Proposals (RFP) and managing the bid process
  • Evaluation of EoIs and RFPs
  • Assistance in finalization of contract and signing of agreement with the successful operator/ developer
  • Developing a roadmap for cost of implementation, including arrangement of equity and debt, to undertake the project in a commercially-viable format
Representative Projects
  • Advisory services for development of multi-level parking projects at various locations- Mumbai
  • Advisory services for development of bus terminals for Andhra Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation
  • Advisory services for bus procurement in the states of West Bengal, Tripura, Himachal Pradesh and Mira-Bhayander in Maharashtra
  • Advisory services for selection of operator for CBS- Noida and Greater Noida
  • Advisory services for development of bus queue shelters in Noida
  • Selection of operators and service providers to run CBS in 7 cities in India
  • Selection of operators and service providers for BRT systems in Surat and Rajkot in India
  • Programme management for the implementation of high-security registration plates (HSRP) in the state of Andhra Pradesh
  • Advisory services for bus procurement in the states of West Bengal, Tripura, Himachal Pradesh and Maharashtra
  • Advisory services for selection of private partner for development of bus terminus cum commercial complex in various cities of Himachal Pradesh
